## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for blog articles and integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance dipped during holidays but is recovering; team aims to increase production to 15 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Integration pages: 4 new ones launched, 4 more incoming; need to improve cross-linking and review processes](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Content CTAs added to GrowthX articles; expanding to Strapi's articles and planning A/B tests](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [New content strategy focusing on non-branded, high-volume keywords and listicles to be presented](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance and Content Strategy

  - [Current stats: \~400 likes, 17-18k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [E-commerce and authentication articles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Goal to reach 1,000 likes per week](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [New strategy: Focus on non-branded keywords, listicles, and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Andrej to present 50-60 new topics based on performance and Strapi's latest features](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [4 new pages launched (Chakra, Chats, Muyi, React Area)](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [4 more incoming (including Render and React Admin)](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Need to improve cross-linking between integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Creating a template for consistency and easier review process](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Content CTAs and A/B Testing

  - [CTAs added to all GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Expanding CTAs to Strapi's own articles](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Planned A/B tests: 1) CTA color, 2) Position, 3) Copy](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Golzar to research impact on MQLs and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

### Content Refreshes and Updates

  - [Continuing with 10 article updates per week](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
  - [Two types: Basic refreshes for underperforming articles and content enrichment for top performers](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [5 refreshes and 10 content enrichments planned weekly](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)

### Review Process and Bandwidth

  - [Team discussing how to handle increased content volume](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Paul and Theo considering daily 1-hour review sessions](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Strapi team bandwidth concerns due to upcoming conference (Strapi Conf)](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to fix and republish the "Top 8 E-commerce APIs" article](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [Andrej to present new content strategy by end of week or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Golzar to add integration pages to the integration hotspot campaign for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [Theo and Paul to finalize and share the new integration page template](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Team to brainstorm next batch of integration pages to create](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Andrej to generate 50-60 new topic ideas focusing on non-branded, high-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Continue with 15 content pieces per week (5 refreshes, 10 enrichments)](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Golzar to research and report on CTA impact on MQLs and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/oZPDo2cXtyBAzMU7KsUE6yXhCtDPuDP5?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
